Description: Install Base UI using npm/yarn/pnpm instead of copying files
Add isolation: isolate to the app root to fix portal stacking contexts
Add relative positioning to body to ensure backdrops cover the visual viewport on iOS 26+
Use CSS Modules, Tailwind, or CSS-in-JS since Base UI is unstyled
Use data-state and other data-* attributes for CSS transitions and animations
Pass a React element or function to the render prop to change the underlying DOM element
Nest render props deeply when composing multiple Base UI components
Assemble components using their namespaced parts like Select.Root and Select.Trigger
Wrap floating elements in a Portal to ensure they render above other content
Use Positioner to anchor popups to their triggers and handle collision
Label form controls using the provided Label component or aria-label
Pass a function as children to Select.Value to render formatted values
Do: Use function as children in Value
Don't: Manually sync value state for formatting

Description: Use Combobox instead of Select when items need filtering
Pass generic type parameters when wrapping components to maintain type safety
Don't: Use any or lose generic types

Description: Use defaultOpen or defaultValue for uncontrolled components
Import components from their specific subpaths for better tree-shaking
